ItacAcademyItem.Name: Aldina (Accademia)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: There is uncertainty over the real existence of the Aldine Academy. The latest contribution on the history of this Academy is in Mario Infelise` Manuzio, Aldo, il Vecchio` in DBI. One more publication, not in British Library collections, is Baptistae Egnatii Oratio in laudem Benedicti Prunuli recitata in qua et iuvenilis aetatis, et sacri ordinis obiter tractata defensio continetur (Venezia: ex academia Aldi Ro. pri. Kal. Octob., 1502). On the Accademia Aldina, see Carlo Dionisotti, Aldo Manuzio, Umanista e editore (1995) e Mario Infelise, `Manuzio, Aldo`, in DBI,
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
